I was having trouble getting the other party to accept that their 'client' authorized the driver to drive.  Went to Brett and within the first 20m he made a call, had my car being repaired and had got me scheduled for a medical assessment.  I was never a dime out of pocket and eventually I also got settlement.  Great service and counsel, fair treatment.  I hope I never need to go back, but if I'm in an accident, I'll definitely use Brett again.

I was in an accident that resulted in many surgeries and they were able to help me with my case in a more than satisfactory manner. I would recommend them to anyone in need of an attorney to handle their case.
I was in a really bad car accident and they help me threw it all great place to go if you get hurt in a car accident.

I was injured in a motorcycle accident. Still reeling from my injuries, the medical bills started to mount. Completely overwhelmed, I asked a family member about legal representation and was directed to contact Mark Flickenger. Mark patiently listened, empathized with my circumstances, and reassured me that I need not worry, that he and his staff would attend to my case. Mr. Flickenger and his staff members made themselves available responding to questions, queries, and concerns. I was reassured and updated through the entire legal process and not once did I ever feel like I was neglected or being intrusive when making contact with them. Complete confidence in Mr. Flickenger and his exceptionally professional and compassionate staff allowed me to qualm my concerns and focus on healing. I highly recommend the services of Mr. Flickenger and his associates without hesitation or reservation. I am truly grateful, appreciative, and indebted to Mark and his staff for their patience, diligence, compassion, and intervention.

If you’re looking for a straight forward attorney who does exactly what he says he’s going to do, then Dennis is your guy. He is seriously the best.
Thank you, Dennis!

I had an excellent experience working with this Dennis Pawelek . From the beginning, they were professional, knowledgeable, and responsive, taking the time to clearly explain the process and my options. I felt well-represented and confident that my case was being handled with care and attention to detail.

Dennis was straight up from the start. You don't know what your going to get with some attorneys, and Dennis was genuine and real with me. His communication and honesty was a breath of fresh air and can not recommend his services enough. The real win was the results I got from him representing me.

We lucked out finding Richard Gale.  He took my criminal case very seriously, remembered every important detail, presented in the most diplomatic fashion, and held the utmost respect of the courtroom.  Every one of my family members has been most impressed with his approach, demeanor, and outlining of all the dynamics at play; you won't find a more competent attorney.  One thing even more rare in attorneys:  Richard is extremely responsive.  I know many of these reviews mention Dennis, but I would not hesitate to work with Richard Gale. I wish I could find an attorney even half as skilled as Richard on the civil side (for a related divorce).  You will be in the best of hands here.

I am incredibly grateful for the support, dedication, and genuine care Dennis Pawelek showed my family. From our very first interaction, it was clear that he is not only extremely knowledgeable, but also truly committed to his clients. Dennis consistently responded in a timely manner, explained everything clearly, and handled our matter with efficiency and attention to detail. During a very stressful and emotional time, he went above and beyond to make sure we felt informed, supported, and confident every step of the way. His professionalism, compassion, and strong work ethic truly set him apart. Dennis is someone who genuinely cares about the people he represents, and it shows in the way he works. I would wholeheartedly and without hesitation recommend Dennis Pawelek to anyone in need of exceptional legal representation.

I cannot say enough about Dennis and the extraordinary work he did on my case. From the very first conversation, it was clear that I was in the hands of someone who not only knew the law inside and out, but who truly cared about the person standing in front of him.

Dennis immediately recognized what was happening in my situation. Before ever stepping foot into a courtroom, he took swift, strategic action and achieved what felt impossible at the time: my case was completely dismissed. The relief and gratitude I felt in that moment is something I will never forget. He didn’t just resolve a legal matter — he gave me my life back.

Throughout the entire process, Dennis walked me through every step with clarity, honesty, and patience. He made sure I understood exactly what was happening, what to expect, and why each decision mattered. Even during moments when I was overwhelmed, anxious, or struggling to process everything, he remained calm, supportive, and incredibly patient. He never made me feel rushed, dismissed, or like my concerns were insignificant.

What truly sets Dennis apart is his ability to combine sharp legal insight with genuine compassion. He saw the bigger picture immediately and worked relentlessly to protect my future, my reputation, and my peace of mind. His dedication went far beyond doing a “job” — he did everything in his power to ensure my life could return to normal as quickly and smoothly as possible.

Dennis is the kind of attorney you hope to find when everything feels uncertain. He is thorough, strategic, empathetic, and exceptionally effective. I am profoundly grateful for his guidance, his advocacy, and his unwavering commitment to achieving the best possible outcome. If you are looking for an attorney who will fight for you with both skill and heart, Dennis is nothing short of absolutely amazing.

dennis is not only the best, he is the most professional person i've met who also treats you like a human being. working with him made me so happy because of the outcome but also so sad because of the relationship that we built that it was sad to have to say goodbye. choose him. you'd be wasting your money anywhere else

I just want to give a shout out to my Attorney Dennis Pawelek a rare moment for me when it comes to Attorneys l’ve never had a more painless or positive experience in Court lm from a small town where the it is hard to find experienced and affordable representation in court Facing serious charges Dennis was amazing I walked out with the best possible outcome at a very fair price I would recommend him to anyone especially those in rural areas Thank you so much Dennis Pawelek you’ve been a blessing 🙏

Dennis is hands down the best attorney I have ever had. I am still at a lost for words. I had been arrested for a 3rd DUI (within 10 years), which would make it a felony charge. I was almost 5x the legal limit and I was looking at pretty severe consequences and time in jail. Dennis was able to look deeply into my case and figure out every single thing that we could potentially use against the court. He was also able to find all of the mistakes that the officer had made during my arrest. With that being said, Dennis was able to get my felony DUI dismissed!!! If you ever get yourself into trouble and you are trying to decide if hiring an attorney is worth it or not, DO IT! I will always recommend Dennis to everyone that is in need of an attorney. He is very honest and straight up with you. He is great at communicating and keeping you up to date, and he will always give his absolute best to your case. 10/10. Thank you Dennis.

I would recommend Denise Pawelek attorney,  again if I needed his help again. He went above and beyond what Attorneys do. He helped me in so many ways. I knew if I texted him he would text right back. He would call even after hours. He fought so hard and because he made sure he had the information needed, I had a good outcome.

Dennis Pawelek was a very professional and caring attorney in the case we hired him to assist us with. He answered questions when we didn’t understand legal issues and terminology. He responded quickly when we called him, even after hours. He was reassuring throughout the entire case. He guided us through some very difficult issues and gave very wise counsel. He represented us in court in a very professional manner and worked well with the prosecutor and judge. We only have the best of things to say about him and would trust him again.

I had a great experience with Dennis Pawelek. I was arrested and the charges were somewhat scary. I’m not a person who is ever in trouble and Dennis was great throughout the ordeal. I was able to get ahold of him with any and all questions that I had. His knowledge and expertise with the court system allowed me to get my case dismissed completely. I would definitely recommend him for anyone going through this process.

I had been given the runaround with my prior lawyers from Salt Lake City and was in a pinch. Dennis listened to my circumstances and stepped in when it counted. He knew exactly what to do and resolved my case in an expedited fashion with favorable results. Highly recommend him!!

Dennis really knows what he’s doing, he will get you caught up with things the court might order before hand and get you the best possible outcome! No jail time, no house arrest, for a first offense DUI I couldn’t have got a better attorney.

I had an incredible experience working with Dennis. He took what I thought was a hopeless situation and turned it into an much better outcome than I ever expected. He was very flexible, easy to work with, understanding and told it exactly how it was. He knows his way around the law and is just an all around likable guy. Take his advice seriously because it works! His retention fee was also very reasonable. I'd give him ten stars if I could! Thanks for keeping me free, Dennis!

Dennis Pawalek is the 🐐
He was able to get my 5 charges which included a class-A misdemeanor waved, as long as I followed a probation period. He was very attentive even while on vacation. Definitely the best attorney I've worked with.

Despite being on personal leave, Dennis immediately reached out to me and took ownership of my case after I sent him a message. His passion for what's good and just was obvious and I truly feel like I couldn't have picked a better lawyer to represent us. What a blessing this man is!
Dennis did a great job for me, I was looking at my third DUI in 15 years, I was able to keep my license no jail time no riffraff I just had to show up to court. He took care of business.

Dennis Pawelek Esquire, is an extremely competent and capable attorney. I highly recommend using his services for criminal defense . He was able to get me very favorable outcomes in  two instances and was very responsive to my questions throughout. If it were possible I'd give him 6 stars.
Dennis did great work getting the best possible outcome.  Responsive, reliable and well respected in court.  Worth it.

Dennis has been very helpful with my case. I had a reckless driving speeding ticket for driving way too fast on one of the highways & Dennis worked with the courts to lower the class level of that and is even putting in the time to try and remove it off of my record entirely! A pleasure to work with & a guy who is willing to go above and beyond to help take care of his clients. He was always very responsive & quick to get back to me which helped expedite the whole process & removed stress off of my shoulders.

Thank you Dennis! I appreciate you! Highly recommend!
My attorney was Dennis and let me just say! I have never had anyone help me and stand in my corner more then he did! I would highly recommend everyone to use pawelek an office!
Dennis got me out of a bind. He worked with the DA and was able to keep me out of jail. I highly recommend him. He always answered his phone and helped me through the process.

Dennis is a phenomenal attorney!  Dennis honestly cares about his client and does an amazing job representing his client.  Dennis has the experience, reputation, and the relationships with prosecutors and judges to make sure you experience is the best you can get.  Noone wants to be involved in a court action, but if you are, there is no doubt in my mind that Dennis will make the situation better.  We couldn't have asked for anyone better to represent us!!!
This fellas a wizard, he kept my life in tact and did more than any attorney I’ve seen.

Dennis pawelek is a really great attorney he's worked on many cases in the past and definitely knows what he's doing in the court. I highly recommended hiring him specially for drug and alcohol related cases, he will always do his best to get you the best outcome possible wether it be getting fines lowered or charges dropped,  this is the guy to go to. Dennis is a Very Knowledgeable and Educated Lawyer. He helped me out tremendously on my case and I am extremely thankful to him! Thank you Dennis...
Richard Gale is an amazing attorney. He is very smart and was able to get my case dropped when I was facing serious charges. I highly recommend.

Dennis, where do I even start. He is just the absolute BEST attorney out there and I refuse to hire anyone else. I have NEVER dealt with law before and I had no idea where to start. He kept me out of jail, and got the BEST CASE scenario for me. He worked his tail off to make sure I wasn’t stressed and that I could still live life normally. Although he claims he’s “just a normal guy”, no. Dennis is extraordinary, and just an unbelievable attorney. I don’t know how I could possibly show him all of the gratitude I have, it’s just not possible. The least I could do, is suggest him left and right. If you want an attorney who knows the court inside out and will keep you safe. Hire Dennis.

My son made a really stupid choice and Dennis helped us navigate the situation easily and got the best possible outcome! He was so easy to reach, so responsive and knowledgeable. He was worth every single penny! I hope I don’t have to ever make a referral for him but if you are scrolling on Google looking for a lawyer and don’t know who to choose, you cannot go wrong with Dennis!

Dennis Pawelek is hands down the best attorney in Utah I was facing a second DUI in 10 years and I was looking at 60 days in jail and severe consequences. I read some reviews on Dennis and decided to go with his firm to represent me in court and it’s been the best decision I’ve made he was able to get me better results on my SECOND DUI then my first. I’m hoping to never need his services again but I will definitely recommend him to anyone and everyone. He is very straight forward and will not make any empty promises. He tells you things as are and I really appreciated that about him. Hands down one of the best if not the best attorney you can hire!!! 15/10 recommend!!!

I got myself into some trouble for the first time got arrested for a DUI and totaled my truck unfortunately after I got bailed i immediately thought about a lawyer I needed someone with skills, intelligence, and based on reviews I found Dennis he helped me out soo much got a great outcome for me no jail time got me probation took a class treatment paid my fines and got my license suspended dropped from 4months to 2 months he was honest and caring from the beginning all the way to end because of him I get to continue to come home everyday and be with my wife and son so for all those who have rough encounters with the law and need a lawyer Dennis is the man to go to when I spoke with him I didn’t hesitate at all I hired him right away he’s amazing!

Dennis really did the best work! He helped me with my husband’s case when i live all the way in Texas! He kept in constant communication with me and talked me through the whole process and kept me updated with all updates. I would highly recommend him with everybody! He got my husbands felony charges brought down to misdemeanors and then got them removed! He went above and beyond for us and If i could give a higher rating i surely would! 1000/10🙌🏻
Dennis is the man you want on your side. Helped me out big time! He was always responsive to answer calls/texts. I’m very happy with the outcome of my case!

This is was very first encounter with the law so I was extremely confused and had many questions and Dennis Pawlek was on it !
Every question I had he was quick to help me out and make sure I knew everything to the best extent, He handled my case extremely well and got the best possible outcome. He is amazing at what he does genuinely.

Attorney Pawelek helped me to get the best possible outcome on my case and helped me ease the stress of the whole legal process and took care of everything for me. If you’re seeking legal help this is the place to go.

This man works miracles. If you're in a tough situation and you value your future and freedom, hire Dennis.

Title: Exceptional Legal Representation – Highly Recommended!

I recently had the privilege of working with Dennis Pawlek for my second DUI case, and I cannot express enough how grateful I am for his expertise and dedication. From our first meeting, Dennis demonstrated a level of professionalism and understanding that immediately put me at ease during a very stressful time in my life.

Dennis took the time to thoroughly explain the legal process and my options, ensuring that I felt informed and supported every step of the way. His extensive knowledge of DUI laws and his strategic approach played a crucial role in helping me stay out of jail. He was committed to minimizing my sentence and worked tirelessly to resolve all my issues effectively.

Throughout the entire process, Dennis was not only my lawyer but also a trusted advisor. He was always available to answer my questions and address my concerns, which made a world of difference in my experience. His attention to detail and strong negotiation skills were evident as he navigated my case with confidence and determination.

Thanks to Dennis Pawlek, I was able to avoid the harshest penalties associated with my second DUI, and I am now on a path to recovery and personal growth. I can honestly say that this has been the best legal experience I have ever had, and I would highly recommend Dennis to anyone facing similar challenges. His dedication to his clients and his expertise in the field are truly unmatched. Thank you, Dennis, for everything!

Dennis is no doubt an excellent attorney. He knows his way around the court system, including the judge and prosecutors. Handled my case very well, in a professional way. You can see he is well-respected by all he deals with, including me. Thanks to Dennis (who I hope to never need again) I’m in a better place than expected.

I had never hired an attorney before so I was clueless as to what to expect, and about the whole court process, but Dennis made the entire process simple to follow.

He explained things thoroughly and kept me updated on everything in a timely manner. He did everything he could to help my case. We ended up getting a more favorable outcome than expected, thanks to Dennis.

He is also very direct and honest, he won’t just tell you what you want to hear so that you’ll hire him, but rather what you NEED to hear-which I appreciated.

Highly recommend!

Dennis is an amazing attorney to have on your side. He assisted me during a DUI case and helped me with the besg possible outcome. He does the best to help people. He is the right person if you ever are in need of legal assistance.

I called Dennis once I knew I needed a lawyer and can I say that was the best decision I ever made.  Dennis listened to everything I said I actually felt like he cared. He didn't  just ask for a ton of money and didn't do anything. He actually worked hard for me and I appreciated it more than he knows. If you need an attorney for criminal consider Dennis you won't regret it!
Dennis works hard for his clients and has your best interests in mind.  Very quick to communicate and eager to fight for you!
This was my 1st time needing a laywer. Called richard and he was so great.1st call with him felt like i was already a valued client and he started the call by giving me free advice straight away.

If you’re guilty and want the best possible plea deal maybe use Dennis. If you’re innocent, don’t waste your money! Dennis will not listen to you or fight for you. He will not work hard and in a timely manner and you will constantly be lied to. Find a different attorney. Don’t waste your money.
reviews.ownerResponse: I’m sorry you feel that way.  I’m not the attorney that tells you what you want to hear, but rather shoot it straight. An attorney that just tells the clients what they want to hear isn’t going to get the best results.  The felony case was dismissed using my strategy and  losing gun rights was avoided.  No jail either. I’m sorry you disagreed with everything I advised you on.

reviews.text: Don’t waste single second wondering if Richard is with your time or money. Hire him immediately. Be honest, be patient and let him work his magic. Richard is hands done one of the best attorneys in Utah. His reputation is immaculate and even that is an understatement of his ability to protect you. Thank you for everything you’ve done for me Richard.

Dennis did an incredible job for our son. He was able to work closely with the prosecutor and the court to negotiate the most favorable outcome possible. I would recommend Dennis to anyone that has legal issues in Utah!
He's a decent human.  Took care of my brother in the end.

i was involved in an auto vs. led accident (me being the pedestrian) and this law firm helped coordinate everything beautifully for me. a majority of communication was with the paralegals Kate and Monica, and they were both so wonderful. Monica, I was able to meet in person and talk to, and we had many conversations about similar life things that made the experience more personable. Tyler Young, the main lawyer, was very kind every time we talked and explained everything very well and in detail that made sense. they were able to get the most of what they could, and i am very thankful for them for handling everything behind the scenes while i could focus on healing

It took 6 business days before they were able to get back to us on whether they could work with us, and at the end they decided that our case wasn't a good fit for them. It was a struggle to get a hold of their paralegal, response was slow, and generally we didn't feel like a priority. I hoped that the experience was better, they seem like a decent firm. Another firm we went to had a better onboarding experience 100%.
The best!
It has no ethics, I would never use it or recommend it.

VERY DISHONEST. I can’t even give this one star but it’s making me. They just hired my roommate this last week on Monday. Told her she was hired, she did the onboarding paperwork and started the job that very day. Then they just told her this morning that they are giving the job to someone else after a “courtesy” interview AFTER they hired her. She missed out on other opportunities. They also had told her that “couldn’t” give her benefits even though they hired her for fill time and wanted full time. VERY dishonest and deceptive. My dad is a lawyer and this is bad for lawyers. Wouldn’t trust them with my needs EVER!! And will spread the news. Nasty stuff.
Tyler Young put our minds at ease the first time we had a consultation. He’s so knowledgeable, kind and compassionate. Best service that we have ever received. 10/10 experience!!

Kester and Jube are my favorite Attorneys! Their knowledge of the law and experience is what makes them stand out from other attorneys. I know I’m in good hands. Thanks to Steve Lund for referring me to them. They’ve become like family to me. Highly recommend!

Filed for divorce over 2 years ago with Michael black divorce never got finalized and he never calls me back, answers my calls, or even talks to me. He pretty much fell off the face of the earth. Very upset that he ignored me and never finalized my divorce.
Matt jube has been a great attorney, I have used him a few times in the past. I recommend him highly!

Tyler Young is the most compassionate lawyer I have met. He reviewed my case for free and consulted with me. Thoroughly impressed with his level of professionalism and compassion. Highly recommend him to anyone who has been in a car accident.
